name: Rep. Donald McEachin
tweet: I first became aware of this injustice when I was a state delegate as I witnessed this neglect in my own background. Richmond's Evergreen and East End Cemeteries are culturally and historically important to our Af Am community but are in dire need of preservation and restoration.

name: Rep. Donald McEachin
tweet: Why are so many of these burial grounds in a state of disrepair or utterly inaccessible? Local laws segregated burial grounds by race. These burial sites were often confined to marginal property or remote areas, and frequently failed to receive monetary support or maintenance.
